'''Blue 9''' was the callsign of one of the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in the forces of [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]], whose fleet included many fighters of the same class. Blue 9 was responsible for destroying [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray's]] [[Trade Federation shuttle]]. The fighter then attempted to destroy the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] carrying a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] delegation. The Jedi used a [[Mind trick/Legends|Force illusion]] to convince Blue 9's pilot his ship had suffered critical damage from numerous attacks by [[Aurek-class tactical strikefighter|Republic fighter]]s. Panicked, the pilot ejected from his fighter, the entire cockpit detaching and floating to safely while the rest of the ship crashed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 37|''Star Wars'' (1998) 37]] {{Flash}}
